# Data Dictionary ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` ── Attaching core tidyverse packages ──────────────────────── tidyverse 2.0.0 ── ✔ dplyr 1.1.2 ✔ readr 2.1.4 ✔ forcats 1.0.0 ✔ stringr 1.5.0 ✔ ggplot2 3.4.2 ✔ tibble 3.2.1 ✔ lubridate 1.9.2 ✔ tidyr 1.3.0 ✔ purrr 1.0.1 ── Conflicts ────────────────────────────────────────── tidyverse_conflicts() ── ✖ dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter() ✖ dplyr::group_rows() masks kableExtra::group_rows() ✖ dplyr::lag() masks stats::lag() ℹ Use the conflicted package () to force all conflicts to become errors ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Component Variable Label Definition Type Mandatory
Project_Table WildlifeHealth_ProjectID Project Identifier System-provided project identifier Integer System-assigned
Project_Table ProjectName Project Name User-provided project name String Yes
Project_Table ProjectCrossID Project Cross Identifier The identifier of the project under another nomenclature system String No
Project_Table WildlifeHealth_ProjectFunder Project Funder The funding sources of the project Multiple selection Yes. Provide at least one option
Project_Table WildlifeHealth_ProjectCountry Country The countries included in the project Multiple selection Yes. Provide at least one option
Project_Table WildlifeHealth_ProjectLeadingOrganization Project Leading Organization The organizations leading the project Multiple selection Yes. Provide at least one option
Project_Table WildlifeHealth_ProjectOtherOrganization Other Organizations in the project Other organizations/partners associated with the project Multiple selection Yes. Provide at least one option
Project_Table WilldifeHealth_ProjectLeader Project leader The head of the project Single selection Yes
Project_Table ProjectPurpose Project Purpose The full objective of the project String Yes
Project_Table ProjectNewFieldActivities Field visits are part of the project Answer to the question: 'Does the project involve field visits?' Boolean Yes
Project_Table WildlifeHealth_ProjectAnimalTaxa Animal species considered in the project The animal species of interest for the project Multiple selection Yes
Project_Table WildlifeHealth_ProjectEnvironmentalSource Environmental sources considered in the project The environmental sources of interest for the project Multiple selection Yes
Project_Table WildlifeHealth_ProjectInvertebrateSource Invertebrate sources considered in the project The invertebrate sources of interest for the project Multiple selection Yes
Project_Table WildlifeHealth_ProjectHazardType Health hazard types targeted The general type of health hazard targeted under the project (e.g., 'Biological', 'Chemical', 'Physical', 'Physiological') Multiple selection Yes
Project_Table WildlifeHealth_ProjectHazardName Specific health hazard targeted The specific health hazards targeted under the project (e.g., 'coronaviridae', 'Brucella abortus') Multiple selection Yes. Options available are conditional on the health hazard types selected
Project_Table ProjectStartDate Project Start Date The date the project oficially started Date Yes
Project_Table ProjectEndDate Project End Date The date the project is projected to end or oficially ended Date Yes
Project_Table WildlifeHealth_ProjectUrl Project URLs URLs of the project, associated with the project, or organizations leading the project String No
Surveillance_Objective WildlifeHealth_SurveillanceObjectiveID Surveillance objective identifier System-provided project identifier Integer System-assigned
Surveillance_Objective SurveillanceObjectiveName Surveillance objective name User-provided surveillance objective name String Yes
Surveillance_Objective SurveillanceObjectiveCrossID Surveillance Objective Cross Identifier The identifier of the surveillance project under another nomenclature system String No
Surveillance_Objective WildlifeHealth_SurveillanceObjectiveType Surveillance objective type The type of surveillance (e.g., Targeted, Scanning, Outbreak Investigation, or Research) Single selection Yes
Surveillance_Objective WildlifeHealth_SurveillanceObjectiveOrganizationInvolved Surveillance objective organizations The organizations involved in the surveillance objective Multiple selection Yes
Surveillance_Objective WildlifeHealth_SurveillanceObjectiveCountry Surveillance objective countries The countries included in the surveillance objective Multiple selection Yes
Surveillance_Objective SurveillanceObjectivePurpose Surveillance objective purpose The specific goal of the surveillance objective String Yes
Surveillance_Objective WildlifeHealth_SurveillanceObjectiveHazardType Surveillance objective hazard type The general type of health hazard targeted by the surveillance objective (e.g., 'Biological', 'Chemical', 'Physical', 'Physiological') Single selection Yes
Surveillance_Objective WildlifeHealth_SurveillanceObjectiveHazardName Surveillance objective hazard name The specific health hazard targeted under the surveillance project (e.g., 'coronaviridae', 'Brucella abortus') Single selection Yes. Options available are conditional on the health hazard type selected
Surveillance_Objective SurveillanceObjectiveStartDate Surveillance objective end date The date the surveillance objective oficially started Date Yes
Surveillance_Objective SurveillanceObjectiveEndDate Surveillance objective end date The date the project is projected to end or oficially ended Date No
Surveillance_Objective SurveillanceObjectiveOrganizationAICUC Organization providing the AICUC The organization providing the AICUC approving the methodology of the surveillance objective String No
Surveillance_Objective SurveillanceObjectiveAICUCCode AICUC Code The code of the AICUC approving the methodology of the surveillance objective String No
Surveillance_Objective SurveillanceObjectiveNewFieldActivityAdded Field visits are part of the surveillance objective Answer to the question: 'Does the surveillance objective involve field visits?' Boolean Yes
Surveillance_Objective SurveillanceObjectiveObservationsIncluded The surveillance objective includes observed-only animals Answer to the question: 'Does the surveillance objective include observed-only animals grouped by species?' Boolean Yes
Surveillance_Objective SurveillanceObjectiveAnimalSourcesIncluded The surveillance objective includes data from individual animals Answer to the question: 'Does the surveillance objective include information from individual animals?' Boolean Yes
Surveillance_Objective SurveillanceObjectiveEnvironmentalSourcesIncluded The surveillance objective includes specimens from environmental sources Answer to the question: 'Does the surveillance objective include specimens from environmental sources (e.g., water)?' Boolean Yes
Surveillance_Objective SurveillanceObjectiveInvertebrateSourcesIncluded The surveillance objective includes specimens from invertebrate sources Answer to the question: 'Does the surveillance objective include specimens from invertebrate sources (e.g., CO2 traps)?' Boolean Yes
Surveillance_Objective SurveillanceObjectiveNewObservationsAdded The surveillance objective adds new observations Answer to the question: 'Does the surveillance objective involve the recording of new observations?' Boolean Yes
Surveillance_Objective SurveillanceObjectiveNewAnimalSourceRecordsAdded The surveillance objective adds new animal records Answer to the question: 'Does the surveillance objective involve the collection of new animal records?' Boolean Yes
Surveillance_Objective SurveillanceObjectiveNewEnvironmentalSourceRecordsAdded The surveillance objective adds new environmental source records Answer to the question: 'Does the surveillance objective include the collection of new specimens from environmental sources (e.g., water)?' Boolean Yes
Surveillance_Objective SurveillanceObjectiveNewInvertebrateSourceRecordsAdded The surveillance objective adds new invertebrate source records Answer to the question: 'Does the surveillance objective include the collection of new specimens from invertebrate sources (e.g., mosquitoes)?' Boolean Yes
Surveillance_Objective SurveillanceObjectiveNewPooledSpecimensAdded The surveillance objective creates new pooled specimens Answer to the question: 'Does the surveillance objective creates new pooled specimens? Boolean Yes
Surveillance_Objective WildlifeHealth_SurveillanceObjectiveLab Surveillance objective laboratories The laboratories associated with the surveillance objective Multiple selection Yes
Surveillance_Objective SurveillanceObjectiveOtherSurveillanceObjectiveAssociated Other Surveillance objectives associated Answer to the question: 'Are there other surveillance objectives associated with the current surveillance project?' Boolean Yes
Surveillance_Objective SurveillanceObjectiveReasonOtherSurveillanceObjectiveAssociated Reason surveillance objective are associated The reason why other surveillance objective are associated with the current surveillance objective (e.g., the other surveillance objective holds the field activies sourcing the specimens used in the current surveillance objective) String Yes, but this field becomes available only when 'Reason surveillance objective are associated' is True
Surveillance_Objective SurveillanceObjectiveMetadataRelevantUrl Surveillance objective URLs URLs of the surveillance objective, associated with the surveillance objective, or organizations leading the surveillance objective String No
Surveillance_Objective SurveillanceObjectiveMetadataPublication Surveillance objective publication Publication references associated with the surveillance objective String No
Surveillance_Objective SurveillanceObjectiveMetadataIncidentGrouping Incidents of the surveillance objective are grouped Answer to the question: 'Are incidents associated with the current surveillance project grouped in units smaller than 'location'?' Boolean No
Surveillance_Objective SurveillanceObjectiveMetadataIncidentGroupingStructure Grouping of incidents Explain the grouping structure of the incidents below 'location' String Yes, but this field becomes available only when 'Incidents of the surveillance objective are grouped' is True
Outbreak OutbreakName Outbreak name The name provided to the outbreak String Yes, if the surveillance objective type is 'Outbreak'
Outbreak OutbreakDiagnosis Outbreak Diagnosis The diagnosis provided to the outbreak String No
Field_Activity WildlifeHealth_FieldActivityID Field activity identifier System-provided field activity identifier Integer System-assigned
Field_Activity FieldActivityCode Field activity code User-provided field activity code String Yes
Field_Activity FieldActivityCrossID Field Activity Cross Identifier The identifier of the field activity under another nomenclature system String No
Field_Activity WildlifeHealth_FieldActivityLeaderName Field activity leader name The leader of the field activity of the surveillance project Single selection Yes
Field_Activity WildlifeHealth_FieldActivityType Field activity type The type of field activity (e.g., 'Market', 'Free-ranging', 'Ranger patroling') Multiple selection Yes
Field_Activity FieldActivityHistory Field activity history The background of the field activity (e.g., why, who, how, where, what for) String Yes
Field_Activity FieldActivityStartDate Field activity start date The date the field activity started Date Yes
Field_Activity FieldActivityEndDate Field activity end date The date the field activity ended Date Yes
Field_Activity_Location WildlifeHealth_FieldActivityLocationID Field activity location cross identifier The identifier of the field activity location under another nomenclature system String Yes
Field_Activity_Location FieldActivityLocation Field activity location name The name of the field activity location String Yes
WildlifeHealth_Incident WildlifeHealth_IncidentID Incident identifier System-provided incident identifier Integer System-assigned
WildlifeHealth_Incident IncidentCrossID Incident cross identifier The identifier of an incident under another nomenclature system String No
WildlifeHealth_Incident IncidentDate Incident date The date of the incident String Yes
WildlifeHealth_Incident WildlifeHealth_IncidentType Incident type The date of the incident String No
WildlifeHealth_Incident IncidentUnit Incident unit Explanation of what the incident represents (e.g., a field finding, a market, a vendor, a cage, a grid cell, a point in a transect, a mist net, etc.) Single selection Yes
WildlifeHealth_Incident WildlifeHealth_IncidentFinding Incident finding Specific set of findings at the incident Multiple selection Yes
WildlifeHealth_Incident WildlifeHealth_IncidentLandscapeType Incident landscape type Specific features of the landscape at the incident Multiple selection No
WildlifeHealth_Incident WildlifeHealth_IncidentBy Incident reported by The person that reported the incident Single selection Yes
WildlifeHealth_Incident WildlifeHealth_IncidentBySector Sector of the reporter The sector of the person that reported the incident Single selection No
WildlifeHealth_Incident IncidentSmartSource Incident from SMART Answer to the question: 'Was the incident recorded using SMART?' Single selection No
WildlifeHealth_Incident IncidentLongitude Longitude Longitude coordinate. Non decimal degree coordinates are automatically converted. If coordinates are provided in UTM, then the UTM zone must be provided Float Yes
WildlifeHealth_Incident IncidentLatitude Latitude Latitude coordinate. Non decimal degree coordinates are automatically converted. If coordinates are provided in UTM, then the UTM zone must be provided Float Yes
WildlifeHealth_Incident IncidentUTMZone UTM Zone UTM Zone. See https://www.dmap.co.uk/utmworld.htm Float Yes if longitude and latitude are supplies in UTM coordinates
WildlifeHealth_Incident WildlifeHealth_IncidentCountry Country Country where the incident happens Single selection Yes
WildlifeHealth_Incident WildliHealth_IncidentState State State where the incident happens Single selection No
WildlifeHealth_Incident WildlifeHealth_IncidentProvince Province Province where the incident happens Single selection No
WildlifeHealth_Incident WildlifeHealth_IncidentSiteCode Site code The site the incidents are grouped by site Single selection No
WildlifeHealth_Incident WildlifeHealth_IncidentZoneCode Zone code The zone the incidents are grouped by zone Single selection No
WildlifeHealth_Incident WildlifeHealth_IncidentMarketCode Market code The market the incidents are grouped by market Single selection No
WildlifeHealth_Incident WildlifeHealth_IncidentGridCode Grid code The grid code the when incidents are grouped by grid Single selection No
WildlifeHealth_Incident WildlifeHealth_IncidentGridCellCode Grid cell code The grid cell code when incidents are grouped by grid cell Single selection No
WildlifeHealth_Incident WildlifeHealth_IncidentStationCode Station code The station code when incidents are grouped by station Single selection No
WildlifeHealth_Incident WildlifeHealth_IncidentTransectCode Transect code The transect code when incidents are grouped by transect Single selection No
WildlifeHealth_Incident WildlifeHealth_IncidentVendorCode Vendor code The vendor code when incidents are grouped by vendor Single selection No
WildlifeHealth_Incident WildlifeHealth_IncidentTrapCode Trap code The vendor code when incidents are grouped by trap Single selection No
WildlifeHealth_Incident WildlifeHealth_IncidentMistNetCode Mist net code The mist net code when incidents are grouped by mist net code Single selection No
WildlifeHealth_Incident IncidentOtherSpatialUnitCode Other spatial unit code The spatial unit code when incidents are grouped by another spatial unit Single selection No
WildlifeHealth_Incident WildlifeHealth_IncidentStudyYear The study year The temporal unit code when incidents are grouped by year unit Single selection No
WildlifeHealth_Incident WildlifeHealth_IncidentStudySeason The study season The temporal unit code when incidents are grouped by study season Single selection No
WildlifeHealth_Incident WildlifeHealth_IncidentStudyMonth The study month The temporal unit code when incidents are grouped by month Single selection No
WildlifeHealth_Incident WildlifeHealth_IncidentStudyWeek The study week The temporal unit code when incidents are grouped by week Single selection No
WildlifeHealth_Incident WildlifeHealth_IncidentStudyDayPeriod The study day period The temporal unit code when incidents are grouped by study day Single selection No
WildlifeHealth_Incident WildlifeHealth_IncidentStudyHour The study hour The temporal unit code when incidents are grouped by study hour Single selection No
WildlifeHealth_Incident IncidentOtherTemporalUnit Other spatial temporal unit code The temporal unit code when incidents are grouped by another temporal unit Single selection No
WildlifeHealth_Incident IncidentTimeAssembled Time assembled The time a trap or similar representing an incident is set up Datetime No
WildlifeHealth_Incident IncidentTimeDisassembled Time disassembled The time a trap or similar representing an incident is dissamsembled Datetime No
WildlifeHealth_Source SourceID Source identifier System-provided source identifier Integer System-assigned
WildlifeHealth_Source SourceCode Source code User-provided source code String Yes
WildlifeHealth_Source SourceCrossID Source cross identifier The identifier of the source under another nomenclature system String No
WildlifeHealth_Source SourceType Source Type The source type (e.g., 'Observaiton', 'Animal', 'Environmental', 'Invertebrate' String Yes
WildlifeHealth_Source SourceSpecies Source Species The source species. Only one for each observation, animal, and environmental sources, but several can apply to invertebrate sources Single selection for Observation, Animal, and Environmental Sources. Does not apply for Invertebrate sources. Yes
WildlifeHealth_Source SourceComments Comments Any comments regarding the source String No
WildlifeHealth_Source WildlifeHealth_SurveillanceObjective Surveillance objective The surveillance objectives that the source is part of Multiple selection No
WildlifeHealth_ObservationSource WildlifeHealth_ObservationSourceID Observation identifier System-provided observation identifier Integer System-assigned
WildlifeHealth_ObservationSource ObservationNumberAdultMaleHealthy Number of healthy male adults The number of healhty male adults observed for the current species Integer Yes
WildlifeHealth_ObservationSource ObservationNumberAdultFemaleHealthy Number of healthy female adults The number of healhty female adults observed for the current species Integer Yes
WildlifeHealth_ObservationSource ObservationNumberAdultUnknownSexHealthy Number of healthy adults of unknown sex The number of healhty adults of unknown sex observed for the current species Integer Yes
WildlifeHealth_ObservationSource ObservationNumberAdultMaleSickOrInjured Number of sick or injured male adults The number of sick or injured male adults observed for the current species Integer Yes
WildlifeHealth_ObservationSource ObservationNumberAdultFemaleSickOrInjured Number of sick or injured female adults The number of sick or injured female adults observed for the current species Integer Yes
WildlifeHealth_ObservationSource ObservationNumberAdultUnknownSexSickOrInjured Number of sick or injured adults of unknown sex The number of sick or injured adults of unknown sex observed for the current species Integer Yes
WildlifeHealth_ObservationSource ObservationNumberAdultMaleDead Number of dead male adults The number of dead male adults observed for the current species Integer Yes
WildlifeHealth_ObservationSource ObservationNumberAdultFemaleDead Number of dead female adults The number of dead female adults observed for the current species Integer Yes
WildlifeHealth_ObservationSource ObservationNumberAdultUnknownSexDead Number of dead adults of unknown sex The number of dead adults of unknown sex observed for the current species Integer Yes
WildlifeHealth_ObservationSource ObservationNumberJuvenileHealthy Number of healthy juveniles The number of healthy juveniles observed for the current species Integer Yes
WildlifeHealth_ObservationSource ObservationNumberJuvenileSickInjured Number of sick or injured juveniles The number of sick or injured juveniles observed for the current species Integer Yes
WildlifeHealth_ObservationSource ObservationNumberJuvenileDead Number of dead juveniles The number of dead juveniles observed for the current species Integer Yes
WildlifeHealth_ObservationSource ObservationNumberFetusHealthy Number of healthy fetuses The number of healthy fetuses observed for the current species Integer Yes
WildlifeHealth_ObservationSource ObservationNumberFetusSickInjured Number of sick or injured fetuses The number of sick or injured fetuses observed for the current species Integer Yes
WildlifeHealth_ObservationSource ObservationNumberFetusDead Number of dead fetuses The number of dead fetuses observed for the current species Integer Yes
WildlifeHealth_ObservationSource ObservationNumberUnknownAgeSexHealthy Number of healthy individuals of unknown age and sex The number of healthy individuals of unknown age and sex observed for the current species Integer Yes
WildlifeHealth_ObservationSource ObservationNumberUnknownAgeSexSickInjured Number of sick or injured individuals of unknown age and sex The number of sick or injured individuals of unknown age and sex observed for the current species Integer Yes
WildlifeHealth_ObservationSource ObservationNumberUnknownAgeSexDead Number of dead individuals of unknown age and sex The number of dead individuals of unknown age and sex observed for the current species Integer Yes
Animal_Source WildlifeHealth_AnimalSourceID Animal source identifier System-provided animal source identifier Integer System-assigned
Animal_Source WildlifeHealth_AnimalSourceSex Animal source sex Sex of the animal source Single selection Yes
Animal_Source AnimalSourceDateOfDeath Animal source death date Date the animal source died or was found dead Date No
Animal_Source AnimalSourceAnyPreviousMarkingCode Previous marking code Answer to the question: 'Did the animal source have any previous marking?' Boolean Yes
Animal_Source AnimalSourcePreviousMarkingCode Animal source previous marking code The previous marking code of the animal source String Yes if 'Previous marking code' is TRUE
Environmental_Source WildlifeHealth_EnvironmentalSourceID Environmental source identifier System-provided environmental source identifier Integer System-assigned
Environmental_Source WildlifeHealth_EnvironmentalSourceType Environmental source type The type of environmental source. For environmental sources, this field deteermines the Specimen type in the Specimen table Single selection Yes
Invertebrate_Source WildlifeHealth_InvertebrateSourceID Invertebrate source identifier System-provided invertebrate source identifier Integer System-assigned
Invertebrate_Source WildlifeHealth_InvertebrateSourceTrapType Trap type The trap type used to get the invertebrates Single selection Yes
Source_Record WildlifeHealth_SourceRecordID Source record identifier System-provided source record identifier Integer System-assigned
Source_Record SourceRecordNumber Source record number The ith recording of the same source (the first time the source is recorded = 1, second time the source is recorded = 2, and so on). For observations it is always 1. Integer Yes, but for observation it is automatically assigned to be 1
Source_Record SourceRecordSpecimensCollected Specimens collected Answer to the question: 'Were specimens collected from this source at time t?' Boolean Yes, but it does not apply to observation source records
Source_Record WildlifeHealth_SourceRecordInvertebrateSpecies Invertebrate species The invertebrate species in an invertebrate source record at time t Single selection. It does not apply for observation, animal, or environmental source records Yes
Source_Record SourceRecordInvertebrateNumberOfIndividuals Number of invertebrates The number of invertebrate individuals in an invertebrate source record at time t Integer. It does not apply for observation, animal, or environmental source records Yes
Source_Record WildlifeHealth_SourceRecordCaptivityCategoryID Captivity category Captivity categories of the animals belonging to an observation source (observation source record 1) or the captivity category of an animal source at time t Multiple selection for observation sources (observation sources record 1) and single selection for animal source records. It does not apply to environmental or invertebrate source records Yes
Source_Record WildlifeHealth_SourceRecordAnomaly Anomalies The anomalies detected in the animals belonging to an observation source (observation source record 1) or the anomalies detected in an animal source at time t Multiple selection for observation sources (observation source record 1) and single selection for animal source records. It does not apply to environmental or invertebrate source records Yes
Source_Record OtherAnomalies Other Anomalies Other anomalies not listed in the previous field in animals belonging to an observation source (observation source record 1) or the anomalies detected in an animal source at time t Multiple selection for observations sources (observation source record 1) and animal source records. It does not apply to environmental or invertebrate source records No
Source_Record WildlifeHealth_SourceRecordPotentialCauseInjuryDisease Potential causes of injury of disease The potential causes of injury or disease in animals belonging to an observation source (observation source record 1) or the potential causes of injury or disease in an animal source at time t Multiple selection for observations sources (observation source record 1) and animal source records. It does not apply to environmental or invertebrate source records Yes if there are sick or injured observed animals or the animal source is dead at time t
Source_Record WildlifeHealth_SourceRecordPotentialCauseDeath Potential causes of death The potential causes of death in animals belonging to an observation source (observation source record 1) or the potential causes of death in an animal source at time t Multiple selection for observations sources (observation source record 1) and animal source records. It does not apply to environmental or invertebrate source records Yes if there are dead observed animals or the animal source is dead at time t
Source_Record Grouping1 Group tag 1 A tag grouping source records in a unit below the incident at time t (e.g., a cage, a pen, a vendor, etc). It can group records from observation, animal, environmental, or invertebrate sources String No
Source_Record Grouping2 Group tag 2 A tag grouping source records in a second level unit below the incident at time t (e.g., a cage, a pen, a vendor, etc). It can group records from observation, animal, environmental, or invertebrate sources String No
Source_Record Grouping3 Group tag 3 A tag grouping source records in a third level unit below the incident at time t (e.g., a cage, a pen, a vendor, etc). It can group records from observation, animal, environmental, or invertebrate sources String No
Source_Record Grouping4 Group tag 4 A tag grouping source records in a fourth level unit below the incident at time t (e.g., a cage, a pen, a vendor, etc). It can group records from observation, animal, environmental, or invertebrate sources String No
Source_Record Grouping5 Group tag 5 A tag grouping source records in a fifth level unit below the incident at time t (e.g., a cage, a pen, a vendor, etc). It can group records from observation, animal, environmental, or invertebrate sources String No
Source_Record SourceRecordComments Comments Any comments regarding the source record String No
Source_Record WildlifeHealth_SurveillanceObjective Surveillance objective The surveillance objectives that the source record is part of Multiple selection Yes
Animal_Source_Record WildlifeHealth_AnimalSourceRecordID Animal source record identifier System-provided animal source record identifier Integer System-assigned
Animal_Source_Record WildlifeHealth_AnimalSourceRecordAgeCategory Age category The age category of the animal source record Single selection Yes
Animal_Source_Record WildlifeHealth_AnimalSourceRecordInitialHealthStatus Initial health status The initial health status of the animal source record Single selection Yes
Animal_Source_Record WildlifeHealth_AnimalSourceRecordHealthConditionReleased Health status at release The health status of the animal source record at release Single selection. This field is automatically assigned 'Dead' if the initial health status is 'Dead' Yes
Animal_Source_Record WildlifeHealth_AnimalSourceRecordEuthanasiaMethod Euthanaasia method The euthanasia method used in the animal source Single selection. It applies if the animal source's 'Health status at release' is 'Dead' at time t No
Animal_Source_Record AnimalSourceRecordCarcassCollected Carcass collected Answer to the question: 'Was the carcass of the animal collected?' Boolean Yes
Animal_Source_Record WildlifeHealth_AnimalSourceRecordFieldStorageCarcass Field storage carcass The method to store the carcass in the field while in transit to a proper facility Single selection but available only if 'Carcass collected' is true Yes
Animal_Source_Record AnimalSourceRecordMarkingCode Record marking code The marking of the animal source at time t String No
Animal_Source_Record AnimalSourceRecordMarkingCodeChange Marking code change Answer to the question: 'Has the marking code, if any, being changed at time t?' Boolean No
Animal_Source_Record AnimalSourceRecordMarkingCodeChangingReason Marking code change reason Explanation of the reason why the marking code has been changed String No
Animal_Necropsy WildlifeHealth_NecropsyID Necropsy identifier System-provided necropsy identifier Integer System-assigned
Animal_Necropsy NecropsyCrossID Necropsy cross identifier The identifier of the necropsy under another nomenclature system String No
Animal_Necropsy NecropsyDate Necropsy date The date the necropsy was conducted String Yes
Animal_Necropsy WildlifeHealth_PrimarySecondaryNecropsy Primary or secondary Answer to the question: 'Is this a primary or secondary necropsy?' Boolean Yes
Animal_Necropsy WildlifeHealth_NecropsyType Necropsy type The type of necropsy (e.g., 'Field necropsy', 'Partial necropsy', 'Full necropsy') Single selection Yes
Animal_Necropsy NecropsyLab Necropsy laboratory The laboratory where the necropsy was conducted String Yes
Animal_Necropsy WildlifeHealth_NecropsyBy Necropsy conducted by The person who conducted the necropsy String Yes
Animal_Necropsy WildlifeHealth_NecropsyCarcassCondition Carcass condition The condition of the carcass by the time of the necropsy Single selection Yes
Animal_Necropsy WildlifeHealth_NecropsyCarcassStorage Carcass storage The method to store the carcass in the laboratory Single selection but it does not apply to 'Field necropsy' Yes
Animal_Necropsy NecropsyExternalSigns External signs The external signs observed in the carcass String No
Animal_Necropsy NecropsyBodyCondition Body condition The body condition observed in the carcass String No
Animal_Necropsy NecropsyEyes Eyes Findings in the eyes of the carcass String No
Animal_Necropsy NecropsyEars Ears Findings in the ears of the carcass String No
Animal_Necropsy NecropsyNostrils Nostrils Findings in the nostrils of the carcass String No
Animal_Necropsy NecropsyMouth Mouth Findings in the mouth of the carcass String No
Animal_Necropsy NecropsySkin/Hair/Coat/Nails Skin, hair, coat, nails Findings in the skin, hair, coat, or nails of the carcass String No
Animal_Necropsy NecropsyWoundsScars Wounds or scars Wounds and scars in the carcass String No
Animal_Necropsy NecropsyExternalParasites External parasites External parasites on the carcass String No
Animal_Necropsy NecropsyInternalParasites Internal parasites Internal parasites in the carcass String No
Animal_Necropsy NecropsyAnus/Perineum/Cloaca Anus, perineum, or cloaca Findings in the anus, perineum, or cloaca of the carcass String No
Animal_Necropsy NecropsySubcutaneousFat Subcutaneous fat The amount of subcutaneous fat of the carcass String No
Animal_Necropsy NecropsyMuscleMass Muscles mass The characteristics of the muscle mass of the carcass String No
Animal_Necropsy NecropsyMusculoskeletalSyst Musculoeskeletal system Findings in the muskuloeskeletal system of the carcass String No
Animal_Necropsy NecropsyBodyCavities Body cavities Findings in the body cavities of the carcass (e.g., 'abdominal', 'thoracic') String No
Animal_Necropsy NecropsyCardiovascularSyst Cardiovascular system Findings in the cardiovascular system of the carcass String No
Animal_Necropsy NecropsyRespiratorySyst Respiratory system Findings in the respiratory system of the carcass String No
Animal_Necropsy NecropsyGastrointestinalSyst Gastrointestinal system Findings in the gastrointestinal system of the carcass String No
Animal_Necropsy NecropsyUrinarySyst Urinary system Findings in the urinary system of the carcass String No
Animal_Necropsy NecropsyReproductiveSyst Reproductive system Findings in the reproductive system of the carcass String No
Animal_Necropsy NecropsyLymphaticSyst Lymphatic system Findings in the lymphatic system of the carcass String No
Animal_Necropsy NecropsyEndocrineSyst Endocrine system Findings in the endocrine system of the carcass String No
Animal_Necropsy NecropsyNervousSyst Nervous system Findings in the nervous system of the carcass String No
Animal_Necropsy NecropsyComments Comments Any comments regarding the necropsy String No
Animal_Necropsy NecropsyConclusion Conclusion The conclusion of the necropsy String No
Animal_Necropsy NecropsyNeedsPathologistReview Needs pathologist review Answer to the quesstion: 'Does the necropsy needs a pathologist review?' Boolean Yes
Environmental_Source_Record WildlifeHealth_EnvironmentalSourceRecordID Environmental source record identifier System-provided environmental source record identifier Integer System-assigned
Invertebrate_Source_Record WildlifeHealth_InvertebrateSourceRecordID Invertebrate source record identifier System-provided invertebrate source record identifier Integer System-assigned
Invertebrate_Source_Record WildlifeHealth_InvertebrateSourceRecordSpecies Invertebrate source record species The invertebrate species in the invertebrate source record Single selection Yes
Invertebrate_Source_Record InvertebrateSourceRecordSpeciesNumberOfIndividuals Number of individuals The number of invertebrates of the corresponding species in the source record Single selection Yes
Source_Record_Specimen WildlifeHealth_SourceRecordSpecimenID Specimen identifier System-provided specimen identifier Integer System-assigned
Source_Record_Specimen SourceRecordSpecimenCode Specimen code User-provided specimen code String Yes
Source_Record_Specimen SourceRecordSpecimenCrossID Specimen cross identifier The identifier of the specimen under another nomenclature system String No
Source_Record_Specimen SourceRecordSpecimenCollectedPrimaryNecropsy Primary Necropsy Specimen Answer to the question: 'Is the Specimen collected during the Primary Necropsy?' Boolean Yes
Source_Record_Specimen SourceRecordSpecimenCollectedSecondaryNecropsy Secondary Necropsy Specimen Answer to the question: 'Is the Specimen collected during the Secondary Necropsy?' Boolean Yes
Source_Record_Specimen WildlifeHealth_SourceRecordSpecimenType Specimen type The type of the specimen. It can be a full carcass Single selection Yes
Source_Record_Specimen WildlifeHealth_SourceRecordSpecimenMedium Medium The medium in which the specimen is contained on Single selection Yes
Source_Record_Specimen SourceRecordSpecimenOriginalQuantity Original quantity The original quantity of specimen Float Yes
Source_Record_Specimen SourceRecordSpecimenOriginalQuantityUnit Quantity unit The unit of the original quantity String Yes
Source_Record_Specimen SourceRecordSpecimenQuantityStored Quantity stored The amount of specimen currently stored Float Yes
Source_Record_Specimen SourceRecordSpecimenReasonQuantityDifference Reason for quantity difference The explanantion for the difference between the original specimen amount and the stored specimen amount String Yes, if 'Quantity stored' and 'Quantity difference' are different
Source_Record_Specimen WildlifeHealth_SourceRecordSpecimenFieldStorage Field storage The method to store the specimen in the field while in transit to a proper facility String Yes
Source_Record_Specimen WildlifeHealth_SourceRecordSpecimenLabStorage Laboratory storage The method to store the specimen in the laboratory String Yes
Source_Record_Specimen SourceRecordSpecimenInContainer Specimen container Answer to the question: 'Is the specimen stored in a container mixed with other specimens?' Boolean Yes
Source_Record_Specimen SourceRecordSpecimenContainerCode Container label The container with the current specimen and other specimens String Yes, but this field becomes available to complete when the previous field is TRUE
Source_Record_Specimen WildlifeHealth_SourceRecordSpecimenLocation Location The institution where the specimen is currently stored Single selection Yes
Source_Record_Specimen WildlifeHealth_SourceRecordSpecimenBuilding Building The specific building within the institution where the specimen is located Single selection Yes
Source_Record_Specimen SourceRecordSpecimenRoom Room The specific room within the building where the specimen is located String Yes
